scripts.setup: pnpm install && uv sync --project worker --python 3.12 && pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop setup:electron
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop format && uv run --project worker ruff format worker/src worker/tests
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop format:check && uv run --project worker ruff format --check worker/src worker/tests
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop lint && uv run --project worker ruff check worker/src worker/tests
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop test && uv run --project worker pytest
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @citemind/desktop typecheck && uv run --project worker mypy worker/src
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
